content.content:
Video creator and ballet dancer who rose to fame on YouTube for the joint Un Par de Ales 
 account she shares with her boyfriend Alexey. They post vlogs, dance videos, and videos about their experience in a multicultural marriage. They have accumulated more than 6 million subscribers and 6.6 billion views on the channel. She first posted on YouTube in December 2018. She also shares a TikTok account with Alexey, where they post-dance and transition videos. They have over 21 million likes on their unpardeales account. She was born and raised in Caracas, Venezuela. She posted a TikTok in January 2023 set toMiley Cyrus' "Flowers."
